entries.definition: relating to the observation and treatment of actual patients rather than theoretical or laboratory studies
entries.exampleSentence: The drug is still undergoing clinical trials before it can be approved for public use.

entries.definition: efficient, rational, and unemotional; coldly detached or analytic
entries.exampleSentence: He described the accident with clinical precision, showing no emotion whatsoever.

entries.definition: very clean and plain, having the sterile appearance of a hospital or clinic
entries.exampleSentence: The apartment was decorated in a clinical white that felt more like a laboratory than a home.
